metadata.description: clawtool — Tools. Agents. Wired. By Bahadır Arda.

plugins.name: clawtool
plugins.description: Tools. Agents. Wired. — wires every AI coding agent (Claude Code / Codex / Opencode / Gemini) onto one timeout-safe, structured-output tool surface. Auto-registers an MCP server on install (no `claude mcp add-json`), biases agent preference via a loaded skill, exposes `/clawtool` slash commands, and dispatches across agents through async BIAM with edge-triggered TaskNotify fan-in. Bundles sandbox profiles (bwrap / sandbox-exec / docker), saved web-UI portals, an MCP scaffolder, and search-first tool discovery. Uninstall removes everything except user data and the binary itself.
